All vi fields in core-network.tracks[0..2,3,5], space.tracks[0..11], and bridges use ASCII romanization (no diacritics) to avoid JSON encoding issues in the toolchain. A native Vietnamese editor should replace these with properly accented text. RF domain tracks r0, r2, r5 use full Unicode diacritics and are considered reliable.
